name: Ghost Lighthouse
description: A beacon that transmits docking instructions for a station that vanished 41 years ago.

name: Cathedral Tide
description: A wavefront of folded mass that turns ship hulls into resonant instruments.
rewardHint: Capture harmonics for high-end nav labs.

name: Bloom Engine
description: A kilometer-wide seed machine quietly growing a second ecosystem in orbit.

name: Ember Mouth
description: A furnace rift that exhales molten particulate in mathematically precise pulses.

name: Choir of Static
description: Background radiation that resolves into a hundred voices whenever a ship powers down.
